title: File is not located within a recognized workspace folder
description: Detects script and config files that exist at the workspace root or in unrecognized directories rather than in the established folder structure (modules/, scripts/, tests/, config/, styles/, agents/, todo/, sin_registry/, sovereign-kernel/, UPM/, pki/, Report/, ~README.md/, ~REPORTS/). Orphaned files outside the folder hierarchy indicate incomplete refactoring, ad-hoc testing leftovers, or agent-generated files that were never properly placed.
detection_method: Enumerate files at workspace root and in non-standard directories. Compare parent folder against recognized_folders list.
preventionRule: All new files must be placed in an appropriate workspace folder. Root-level files are restricted to Main-GUI.ps1, View-Config.ps1, Launch-*.bat, and *.xhtml entry points.
remedy: Move the file into the correct workspace folder. If the file is a new category, create the folder and document it in FILES-MANIFEST.md.
